body.title: Rename GitHub repo agent_datacenter → UnseenUniversity
body.result: GitHub repo renamed akienm/agent_datacenter → akienm/UnseenUniversity; local remote URL updated; old URLs redirect automatically
body.description:
Rename the GitHub repository from akienm/agent_datacenter to akienm/UnseenUniversity and update the local git remote URL to match. GitHub auto-redirects all existing issue/discussion/PR links.

**Affected files:** .git/config (remote URL update only)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** GitHub repo rename + local remote URL update only; no source file content changes
**Test plan:** `git remote -v` shows new URL; https://github.com/akienm/agent_datacenter redirects to new repo
